stories.headline: Micron Crosses $1 Trillion Market Cap as AI Memory Chip Demand Surges
stories.key_takeaway: Micron joined the trillion-dollar club after an 18% single-day surge driven by UBS tripling its price target to $1,625.

pull_quote.text: No reason why MU should trade a whole lot differently than NVDA in terms of P/E.

stories.article_excerpt: Micron Technology stormed into the trillion-dollar club on Monday, its stock surging 18% in a single session after UBS analyst Timothy

stories.headline: Commure Raises $70 Million at $7 Billion Valuation to Deploy AI Agents Across Healthcare
stories.key_takeaway: Commure's $70M raise at a $7B valuation signals investor conviction shifting toward vertical AI agent systems that autonomously execute healthcare administrative work.

pull_quote.text: AI can. We are already performing this work, from specialty clinics to the country's largest health systems.

stories.article_excerpt: Healthcare has spent three decades waiting for software to fix its paperwork problem. Commure just raised $70 mil

stories.headline: Anthropic Acquires Developer Tools Startup Stainless for Over $300 Million
stories.key_takeaway: Anthropic acquired Stainless for over $300 million, gaining control of the SDK generation tool used by rivals OpenAI and Google.

pull_quote.text: Agents are only as useful as what they can connect to.

stories.article_excerpt: Anthropic made its biggest acquisition to date on May 18, snapping up Stainless, a New York-based developer tools startup.

stories.headline: Zendesk Commits $100 Million Over Two Years to Help Startups Build With AI
stories.key_takeaway: Zendesk is making a tenfold increase in startup investment, offering free AI tools through Series B.

pull_quote.text: The decisions founders make early about their customer infrastructure shape everything that comes after.

stories.article_excerpt: Zendesk is betting big on the next generation of AI-native startups. At its annual Relate conference on May 20.

stories.headline: Parallel Web Systems Raises $100 Million to Build Web Infrastructure for AI Agents
stories.key_takeaway: Former Twitter CEO Parag Agrawal's Parallel raised $100M Series B at $2B valuation to build web infrastructure for AI agents.

pull_quote.text: We founded Parallel on a conviction that agents will use the web a thousand times more than humans ever have.

stories.article_excerpt: Former Twitter CEO Parag Agrawal's Parallel Web Systems has closed a $100 million Series B at a $2 billion valuation.

stories.headline: AI Studios Launches Context-Aware Expressive TTS Engine With Over 1000 AI Voices
stories.key_takeaway: DeepBrain AI's AI Studios now offers context-aware expressive TTS across 1,000+ voices that automatically adapt tone without manual tags.

pull_quote.text: We are moving past AI that recites text. Expressive TTS that reads context and performs accordingly is the new baseline.

stories.article_excerpt: DeepBrain AI is betting that the next frontier in synthetic speech is not just sounding human, but performing like one.

stories.headline: SubQ Ships First Commercial Subquadratic LLM With 12 Million Token Context Window
stories.key_takeaway: Subquadratic ships SubQ, the first commercial LLM on a fully subquadratic architecture with a 12M-token context at up to 1,000x lower compute cost.

pull_quote.text: We are very focused on the problem of how we transition from a dense attention, quadratic scaling architecture to a sparse attention linear architecture.

stories.article_excerpt: Every large language model shipped in the past decade has run on the same basic engine: the dense-attention transformer.

stories.headline: 76 Percent of Organizations Now Have a Chief AI Officer, Up From 26 Percent in 2025
stories.key_takeaway: The CAIO role nearly tripled in one year from 26% to 76% of organizations, per IBM's 2026 CEO Study of 2,000 global leaders.

pull_quote.text: The CEOs delivering real results from AI transformation are redesigning their organizations to bring together the best people with the best technology.

stories.article_excerpt: A year ago, the chief AI officer was a curiosity. Today, it is the fastest-growing C-suite role in corporate America.

stories.headline: Agentic AI Replaces Chatbot Wrappers as Enterprise Buyers Demand Tools That Act
stories.key_takeaway: Enterprise buyers are abandoning chatbot wrappers for agentic AI that executes real workflows, with 40% of enterprise apps expected to embed agents by end of 2026.

pull_quote.text: Buyers now want tools that take actions in sales, coding, legal, search, and admin work, not just generate text.

data_points.label: Enterprise apps with agents by EOY

stories.article_excerpt: The era of the chatbot wrapper is over. A decisive shift is underway in enterprise AI procurement.

stories.headline: Researchers Map Brain-LLM Alignment Using fMRI Data From 112 Participants
stories.key_takeaway: The apparent English advantage in brain-LLM alignment is an artifact of training data composition, not an inherent property of English.

pull_quote.text: These results reveal that the apparent English advantage in brain-LLM alignment is an artifact of training data composition.

stories.article_excerpt: For years, neuroscientists and AI researchers have danced around a tantalizing question: do LLMs process language the way

stories.headline: AI Catalyzes Paradigm Shift in Medical Robotics Across Surgical and Rehabilitation Domains
stories.key_takeaway: J&J-NVIDIA digital twins, AiM-Siemens MRI-guided neurosurgery, and clinical data showing 25-40% improvements signal AI medical robotics have crossed from experimental to viable.

pull_quote.text: Simulation is the next frontier in surgical robotics. With AI-driven simulation, we can create high-fidelity digital twins.
pull_quote.role: SVP, Global Head of Robotics, J&J MedTech

stories.article_excerpt: The operating room of 2026 looks nothing like it did a decade ago. Robotic arms guided by AI now perform procedures.

stories.headline: Machine Unlearning Through Manifold Representation Forgetting Advances AI Privacy
stories.key_takeaway: New manifold-based machine unlearning method ManiF-SMC pushes erased data off learned manifolds, offering stronger forgetting guarantees for GDPR.

pull_quote.text: Existing unlearning studies that rely on label manipulation or task-gradient reversal often deliver limited unlearning effectiveness.

stories.article_excerpt: When you ask a company to delete your data, a database entry vanishes in milliseconds. But when data is woven into neural

stories.headline: Colorado Governor Signs SB 189 Replacing Landmark AI Accountability Act
stories.key_takeaway: Colorado scrapped its pioneering AI law under pressure, replacing it with a narrower transparency framework effective January 1, 2027.

pull_quote.text: I have whittled this bill down to more of a discrimination decision bill. It is not as comprehensive and I am not happy with that.

stories.article_excerpt: Two years after passing the first comprehensive AI law, Colorado has torn it up and started over.

stories.headline: Microsoft, Google, and xAI Agree to Give US Regulators Pre-Release Access to AI Models
stories.key_takeaway: Google, Microsoft, and xAI signed voluntary agreements allowing CAISI to evaluate frontier models before release, joining OpenAI and Anthropic.

pull_quote.text: Independent, rigorous measurement science is essential to understanding frontier AI and its national security implications.

stories.article_excerpt: Three of the world's most powerful AI companies have opened the door to government oversight.

stories.headline: White House Pushes Federal AI Framework to Override Patchwork State Regulations
stories.key_takeaway: The Trump administration pushes to centralize AI regulation, but Congress rejected preemption 99-1 and 36 state AGs prepare legal challenges.

pull_quote.text: If the Trump Administration tries to enforce this ridiculous order, we will see them in court.

stories.article_excerpt: A constitutional collision is brewing over who gets to write the rules for AI in America.
